checklistName: Private Local Home PC Continuation Check
baseline: PR #250 merged / Phase21-55 reflected on main / home PC development resumed / main sync / private local continuation / no Pages

continuationChecks.label: PR #250 merged and Phase21-55 is reflected on main.
Latest main HEAD is 9ba162c before Phase21-56 starts.
Home PC development resumed from the Phase21-55 / PR #250 continuation state.
main sync is confirmed before continuing private local work.
continuationChecks.command: git switch main / git pull origin main / git status

continuationChecks.label: Working tree clean is required before local display confirmation.

privateLocalOperationChecks.label: Private Local first remains the operation baseline.
Manual launch through private-local.html / index.html remains required.
Desktop shortcut operation remains optional, not required.
Local files and browser display confirmation are required.

prPolicyChecks.label: Merge only after user confirmation; merge is not performed by this operation.
main direct push is not allowed.

blockedAutomationChecks.label: GitHub Pages is not required and no public URL is added.
No automatic remote publish is added.
No hidden background update is added.
No suspicious auto-run script is added.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not create or modify .bat files.
Do not create or modify .ps1 files.
Do not create or modify .cmd files.
Do not create or modify .exe files.

operationPolicy: Private Local operation remains manual, protected, and local first after PR #250 / Phase21-55 is merged into main.
safeLocalUsePolicy: Safe local use requires home PC main sync, clean working tree, local browser confirmation, and no GitHub Pages requirement.
prPolicy: PLAN_ONLY / protected / draft PR only remains active; Ready for review and merge require explicit user confirmation.
nextRecommendedStep: Create the Phase21-56 Draft PR from the home PC continuation branch, keep it Draft, confirm private-local.html and index.html locally, and do not merge until user confirmation.
